name: The Final Recount
text:
Choose a die roll or coin flip from this turn — anyone's — and demand a recount. Reroll or reflip it. Then put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock for each time it has now been recounted (this game).
Prophecy (As this resolves, predict the new result out loud.) If you predicted the recount correctly, you draw two cards and the recount is certified in your favor.
flavorText: "We will recount until the numbers confess."
